pages.text: $(l)Casting Sand$() — the consumable half of sand casting. Eight sand around a clay ball makes eight.

Place Casting Sand on a $(l)Casting Table$(), then press any existing part into the sand to impress its shape. Templates are never consumed.$(br2)No part yet? A vanilla $(l)ingot$() impresses the ingot shape, $(l)flint$() a sharpening stone, a $(l)brick$() a polishing stone.
pages.title: Impress a Shape

pages.text: Pour molten metal onto the impressed sand — bucket or pipe, from above. It fills, then cools from glowing to solid.$(br2)Sweep the sand away with a $(l)brush$() and take your part, or let a hopper collect it underneath.
pages.title: Pour, Cool, Brush
